title: 学习
description_uz: «So'nggi paytlarda nima o'rganyapsan? Men xitoy tilini qiyin deb bilaman.» — til o'rganayotgan ikki do'stning suhbati. Bu dialog nima o'rganishni so'rash, qiyinchiliklarni aytish va birga o'rganishni taklif qilishni mashq qiladi. Yaqin mavzu, foydali o'quv so'zlari — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal. Gapirishga ishonch berish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Что ты учишь в последнее время? Я нахожу китайский трудным.» — разговор двух друзей, которые учат языки. Этот диалог тренирует, как спрашивать, что человек изучает, говорить о трудностях и предлагать учиться вместе. Близкая тема, полезная учебная лексика — идеально для повторения. Отлично для уверенности в речи.
description_en: «What are you learning lately? I find Chinese hard.» — a chat between two friends who are studying languages. This dialogue practices asking what someone is learning, talking about difficulties, and offering to study together. Relatable topic, useful study vocabulary—perfect for repetition. Great for building speaking confidence.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì jìn zài xué shén me?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что ты учишь в последнее время?
sentences.text_translation_en: What have you been studying lately?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zài xué Yīng yǔ. Nǐ ne?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我在学中文。我觉得中文很难。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zài xué Zhōng wén. Wǒ jué de Zhōng wén hěn nán.
sentences.text_translation: Men xitoy tilini o'rganyapman. Xitoy tili juda qiyin deb o'ylayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я учу китайский. Думаю, китайский очень сложный.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm learning Chinese. I think Chinese is very hard.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Xiě zì hěn nán, fā yīn yě nán.
sentences.text_translation: Harf yozish qiyin, talaffuz ham qiyin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Писать иероглифы сложно, произношение тоже сложное.
sentences.text_translation_en: Writing characters is hard, and pronunciation is hard too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān xué duō jiǔ?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long do you study each day?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ měi tiān xué yí ge xiǎo shí.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я занимаюсь по часу в день.
sentences.text_translation_en: I study for an hour every day.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Xiě. Dàn shì wǒ xiě de bù hǎo.
sentences.text_translation_en: I do. But I don't write them well.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Méi guān xi. Màn man xué, màn man xiě.
sentences.text_translation: Zarari yo'q. Asta-sekin o'rgan, asta-sekin yoz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ничего страшного. Учись потихоньку, пиши потихоньку.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's okay. Learn slowly, write slowly.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ Yīng yǔ xué de zěn me yàng?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还可以。我每天都听英语歌。
sentences.pinyin: Hái kě yǐ. Wǒ měi tiān dōu tīng Yīng yǔ gē.
sentences.text_translation: Yomon emas. Har kuni ingliz qo'shiqlarini tinglayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Неплохо. Я каждый день слушаю английские песни.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not bad. I listen to English songs every day.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有用。听歌可以帮助学习。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yòng. Tīng gē kě yǐ bāng zhù xué xí.
sentences.text_translation: Foydali. Qo'shiq tinglash o'qishga yordam beradi.
sentences.text_translation_en: It is. Listening to songs can help you learn.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也想试试。你教我好吗？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng shì shi. Nǐ jiāo wǒ hǎo ma?
sentences.text_translation: Men ham sinab ko'rmoqchiman. Menga o'rgatasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже хочу попробовать. Научишь меня?
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to try it too. Will you teach me?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ men yì qǐ xué!
sentences.speaker: B
